global.description: The ad features a minimalist design with a focus on the NovaPay brand and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save with confidence using NovaPay.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of a large square and a smaller circle in a soft purple background, creating an abstract design.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified visual element that appears to be centered but lacks clear identification.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: Another unspecified visual element, similar to the previous one, also centered with no clear identification.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear visual element located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Save with confidence' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Built for peace of mind'.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo of NovaPay, displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a contrasting color.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A small, white text button at the bottom of the ad that says 'Learn more'.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown advertiser, unknown vertical, interstitial format, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include NovaPay logo and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, NovaPay, Learn more
